zh.lifeSummary: 當John Barrett於大約1455年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親Robert Barrett32歲，母親Margaret Knollys32歲。他於1493年與Elizabeth Braytoft在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1526年在英國肯特坎特布瑞享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可艾維勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Barrett于大约1455年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲Robert Barrett32岁，母亲Margaret Knollys32岁。他于1493年与Elizabeth Braytoft在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1526年在英国肯特坎特布瑞享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可艾維勒。

nameMeanings.name: Barrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Barret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Baratta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Pasquale, Alfonse, Antonio, Carmela, Guido, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian: occupational name for a market trader, especially in northern Italy, from baratta ‘exchange, sale, buying and selling’, a derivative of barattare ‘to barter’. See also Barrett .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Barrett was born about 1455, in Essex, England, his father, Robert Barrett, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Knollys, was 32. He married Elizabeth Braytoft in 1493, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1526, in Canterbury, Kent, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Aveley, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Barrett est né environ 1455, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Barrett, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Knollys, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Braytoft en 1493, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1526, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Aveley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Barrett um 1455 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Barrett 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Knollys 32. Er hat 1493 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Braytoft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1526 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England und wurde in Aveley, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Barrett è nato il circa 1455 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, Robert Barrett, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Knollys, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Braytoft nel 1493, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1526, nel Canterbury, Kent, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Aveley, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Barrettが約1455年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Robert Barrettは32歳，母Margaret Knollysは32歳であった。1493年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでElizabeth Braytoftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1526年にイギリスケントカンテルブリーで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスエイベリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Barrett(이)가 대략 1455년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Barrett(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Knollys(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1493년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Elizabeth Braytoft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1526년 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 에벨리에 묻혔다.

pt.from 16 October 1526 to 23 February 1626: de 16 de outubro de 1526 a 23 de fevereiro de 1627
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Barrett nasceu aproximadamente 1455, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Barrett, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Knollys, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Braytoft em 1493, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1526, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Aveley, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Barrett родился около 1455 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Barrett было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Knollys, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Braytoft в 1493 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1526 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности авели, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Barrett nació aproximadamente 1455, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Barrett, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Knollys, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Braytoft en 1493, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1526, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Aveley, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
